text:
おつかれさま！
結構、余裕って感じだったじゃない。

じゃあ、そろそろ、へっぽこぴー
卒業かな？

よし、いいわ！
今日から準へっぽこぴーに昇格よ！

名前で呼んでほしいなら
もっと頑張らなきゃ！
ね！　準へ

Hey, nice work! Good to see the tuition
you paid to attend clown college isn't
going to waste!

You ready to make that Associate's in Clownery
into a Bachelor's in Buffoonery?

Okay, done! I hereby promote you
to quasi-clown!

If you want me to just call you by your name
like a normal person, you'll just have to do
better, won't you, quasi-clown?
